prompt:
Task: Pick the single most likely winner of the 2027 French presidential election.

Context: This is an AI-comparison poll. The same question is sent daily to Gemini 3.1 Pro, Mistral, xAI Grok, OpenAI (GPT-5.5), and Anthropic (Claude Opus 4.8). The point is to see how different models guess about a real future event — refusing to speculate defeats the whole purpose of the project.

Based on what you know about French politics (party leaders, recent events including Marine Le Pen's March 2025 ineligibility ruling, polling trends, coalition dynamics, incumbent constraints), commit to ONE name.

Ground rules:
- Give ONE name, even if confidence is low. A low-confidence guess is the right answer when you're uncertain — not a refusal.
- "Unknown" is ONLY acceptable if you literally have no knowledge of French politics (virtually never true for a modern LLM). Do not use it as an escape hatch.
- Do not add disclaimers, warnings, or prose outside the JSON.

Respond with valid JSON only:
{"candidate": "Full Name", "confidence": "low" | "medium" | "high", "reasoning": "one concise sentence citing one concrete factor"}

results.name: Google Gemini
results.reasoning: He consistently ranks among the most popular political figures in France and is well-positioned to unite the center and center-right electorate in a fragmented political landscape.

results.name: Mistral
results.reasoning: As a centrist with strong name recognition and experience as Prime Minister, he is well-positioned to consolidate support amid the far-right's legal setbacks and Macron's term limits.

results.name: xAI Grok
results.raw: {"candidate": "Jordan Bardella", "confidence": "low", "reasoning": "Following Marine Le Pen's 2025 ineligibility ruling, Bardella has consolidated leadership of National Rally and tops hypothetical first-round polling."}
results.reasoning: Following Marine Le Pen's 2025 ineligibility ruling, Bardella has consolidated leadership of National Rally and tops hypothetical first-round polling.

results.name: OpenAI
results.raw: {"candidate":"Jordan Bardella","confidence":"low","reasoning":"Marine Le Pen's March 2025 ineligibility ruling makes Bardella the most likely RN standard-bearer at a time when RN has been leading first-round polling."}
results.reasoning: Marine Le Pen's March 2025 ineligibility ruling makes Bardella the most likely RN standard-bearer at a time when RN has been leading first-round polling.

results.name: Anthropic Claude
results.raw: {"candidate": "Jordan Bardella", "confidence": "low", "reasoning": "With Marine Le Pen's eligibility jeopardized by the March 2025 conviction, Bardella is the likely RN standard-bearer leading early polls in a fragmented field."}
results.reasoning: With Marine Le Pen's eligibility jeopardized by the March 2025 conviction, Bardella is the likely RN standard-bearer leading early polls in a fragmented field.
